claimText: The Energy Transition Index (ETI) is released by the World Economic Forum (WEF).
evidenceExcerpt: Released by the World Economic Forum (WEF).
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the publishing organization of the index.

claimText: India's rank in the Energy Transition Index dropped to 71 in 2025 from 63 in 2024.
evidenceExcerpt: India's rank dropped to 71 in 2025 from 63 in 2024.
examUse: Statement-based question on India's performance and trend in the index.

claimText: Sweden ranked first in the Energy Transition Index (ETI) 2025.
evidenceExcerpt: Sweden ranked first in the 2025 index.
examUse: Fact-based question on the top-performing country in the index.

claimText: The Energy Transition Index (ETI) assesses countries based on two main aspects: System Performance and Transition Readiness.
evidenceExcerpt: Assesses System Performance (energy security, equity, sustainability) and Transition Readiness (regulation, infrastructure, investment).
examUse: Statement-based question on the parameters and methodology used to calculate the index.
distractorHooks: Includes GDP growth as a primary aspect
Focuses solely on renewable energy capacity
